inline_comments.message:
It's the InstanceUUID required by the Casablanca logging standards

2019-02-28T18:16:45.825Z        pool-1-thread-1 ERROR   org.onap.pomba.contextaggregator.service.ContextAggregatorProcessor     InstanceUUID=90e73e94-bd39-4716-a7d5-ee1e1b1971e4, RequestId=ddf9c385-d92d-4597-95b9-b983c2719d8d, ServiceName=context-aggregator, ServiceInstanceId=PombaDemoCust_001-ServiceInst-001, StartTime=2019-02-28T18:16:41.017Z, InvocationID=3417e19c-e0a8-4bcf-bec0-1df24d322f34, ClientAddress=dev-pomba-pomba-contextaggregator-7f6df89486-czmt8, PartnerName=RTAIT, StatusCode=ERROR
Should be "instanceID" rather than "instanceUUID" according to https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=28378955 ?

Ah, yes, I see it's the attribute formerly known as InstanceUUID.

I can fix it here and in the other microservices that are being updated as part of https://jira.onap.org/browse/LOG-551, but this problem permeates all of the other microserives so we should probably have a defect to update them.
